name: WSD-Zero-Cost-AI
cost_note: $0 - local LAN Ollama/AI gateway, BYOK optional
desc: Android A15/A16/A17 Termux client talking to a Mac-hosted local Ollama/AI gateway over the home LAN (bearer-token auth, DNS routing plan).

name: wsd_ccos_ai_lab (.env.zero_cost)
cost_note: $0 - local Ollama default, cloud keys hard-disabled
desc: Separate BYOK env template (BYOK_ZERO_COST_MODE=true, OPENAI_HARD_DISABLE=true) defaulting to local Ollama qwen2.5:0.5b. Has its own git repo.

name: free-llm-api-resources
desc: Maintained, auto-generated catalog of real free-tier LLM API providers (OpenRouter free models, Google AI Studio, Groq, Cerebras, HuggingFace, GitHub Models, Cloudflare Workers AI) with sourced rate limits.

name: FREE-openai-api-keys
desc: Listed 'keys' (e.g. sk-abcdef1234567890...) are placeholder patterns, not real credentials. Will not authenticate with any provider.

name: free-1000-tb-cloud-cluster-mesh
desc: Empty scaffold repo (README: '(TODO: Add description)'). No provider offers anywhere near 1000TB free; claim is currently unsubstantiated and unimplemented.
